# Saturation Height Modeling

**Summary**: A method to relate water saturation to height above the free water level using capillary pressure and rock properties.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2010-alroudhan|AlRoudhan, 2010]] applied saturation-height-modeling to calculate water saturation profiles.

## Key Results and Findings

- The Leverett J-function is a standard approach for normalizing capillary pressure curves across different rock qualities. ([[2010-alroudhan|AlRoudhan, 2010, p. 55]])
